templates.title: Blank plot
templates.description: Empty 30 × 40 ft plot with a single floor slab. Best when you want to build your house entirely from scratch.

templates.title: Verandah cottage
templates.description: Single-story Konkan cottage with a front verandah (4 pillars), living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, and a hip roof.

templates.title: Two-story Konkan
templates.description: Full two-story starter with verandah, living/kitchen on the ground floor, staircase, three bedrooms + study on the first floor, and a hip roof.
